data.name: Crooked Knobs
data.detailed_description:
A well known Detective received an invitation by the wealthy Viktor Von Schlonger to take part to his infamous dinner party, where only the richest, dodgiest and overall peculiar people in the world are welcomed, and only once a year.

In Crooked Knobs, you are said Detective. All fine, all simple. Just enjoy the vacation, relax your brain, and don't think much of the mötley crüe of criminals and felons that will accompany you for the entire duration. Surely, none of them might have a reason to...

ATTEMPTED murder why thank you, but still... heinous all the same. Viktor Von Schlonger is attacked and almost killed throughout the night, and the one who did it is certainly within reach.

Will you be able to solve the mystery, find the murderer, and motives behind their actions in this point-and-click murder mystery? Perhaps. But be wary, there's more than meets the eye around...

A huge, isolated Villa on top of a cliff of a remote Lewdropean peninsula, Von Schlonger's Mansion ain't nothing to mess with. Over the years, the eccentric raccoon molded it into somewhat of a madhouse, chock full of fascinating vistas, childish arcade rooms, gold furniture... and terrible secrets.

A similar place surely makes it easier to come up with a murder plan, with many hiding spots, escape routes, and improvised weapons. Crooked Knobs is all about being observant... and being observant is key, because if anyone knows this mansion inside and out, it is certainly...

Devious, friendly, ruthless, cold-hearted, loving, we have 'em all. None of the 12 guests roaming around the mansion can be completely trusted, but all of them can be helpful... with a little "push". Yes, you can "push" them all. High morals are flexible anyway.

Careful though... one (or more) of them is the murderer. And they'll make sure their "help" might throw you in the wrong direction to complicate the case further. Use all the instruments at your disposal and choose wisely, you only have 6 hours to spare before letting them all go.

Fortunately, you're not exactly... alone on your quest. But I can't spoil everything now can I.

Only one way to find out all there is to know. I hope you'll enjoy Crooked Knobs. In more than one way, goes without saying!

  • Unravel the mystery behind Viktor Von Schlonger's attempted murder and his eccentric mansion in Five distinct murder cases.

  • Meet 12 different guests, and press them to tell you the truth. Where you press them and how deeply you'll do it, is up to you.

  • Discover an interconnected story full of twists and turns.

  • Use your observation skills to find evidence and put 6 and 9 together! Nothing during a case is signposted or covered in yellow paint, look around carefully, and don't leave any stone unturned!

  • Study your opponents through your Detective tools: have a chat, gather them all for a mass interrogation, spy on them when they disappear, or challenge them to a Tongue Wrestling Match.

  • You're not alone in this quest, your "Partner" will give you a hand~ with some of the most valuable tools in your arsenal.

  • See and unlock many, many, MANY spicy scenes.

ABOUT THESE "AI CONTENT DISCLOSURE" THAT ARE ALL THE RAGE NOWADAYS....

None of that here. Absolutely NO ASSET in this game is, or will EVER be created, through the use of generative AI. That's why I ask you guys to be patient and bear with me, it is going to take a minute to get this done.

In the meantime though, I've prepared a demo prologue to hold you over (releasing December 15, 2025), containing all original content not present in the main game. Please enjoy!

data.short_description: Solve the mystery of Von Schlonger's attempted murder (and many other mysteries that might even have you forget about that one) in this sexy point-and-click adventure! Explore the huge isolated (and haunted?) mansion, squeeze the answers out of its guests, and reach out for the truth!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.8 GHz Intel Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 12 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any GPU with at least 4GB of VRAM
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.8 GHz Intel Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any GPU with at least 8GB of VRAM
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04 and later
  • 處理器: 2.8 GHz Intel Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 12 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any GPU with at least 4GB of VRAM
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04 and later
  • 處理器: 2.8 GHz Intel Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any GPU with at least 8GB of VRAM
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Crooked Knobs
data.detailed_description:
A well known Detective received an invitation by the wealthy Viktor Von Schlonger to take part to his infamous dinner party, where only the richest, dodgiest and overall peculiar people in the world are welcomed, and only once a year.

In Crooked Knobs, you are said Detective. All fine, all simple. Just enjoy the vacation, relax your brain, and don't think much of the mötley crüe of criminals and felons that will accompany you for the entire duration. Surely, none of them might have a reason to...

ATTEMPTED murder why thank you, but still... heinous all the same. Viktor Von Schlonger is attacked and almost killed throughout the night, and the one who did it is certainly within reach.

Will you be able to solve the mystery, find the murderer, and motives behind their actions in this point-and-click murder mystery? Perhaps. But be wary, there's more than meets the eye around...

A huge, isolated Villa on top of a cliff of a remote Lewdropean peninsula, Von Schlonger's Mansion ain't nothing to mess with. Over the years, the eccentric raccoon molded it into somewhat of a madhouse, chock full of fascinating vistas, childish arcade rooms, gold furniture... and terrible secrets.

A similar place surely makes it easier to come up with a murder plan, with many hiding spots, escape routes, and improvised weapons. Crooked Knobs is all about being observant... and being observant is key, because if anyone knows this mansion inside and out, it is certainly...

Devious, friendly, ruthless, cold-hearted, loving, we have 'em all. None of the 12 guests roaming around the mansion can be completely trusted, but all of them can be helpful... with a little "push". Yes, you can "push" them all. High morals are flexible anyway.

Careful though... one (or more) of them is the murderer. And they'll make sure their "help" might throw you in the wrong direction to complicate the case further. Use all the instruments at your disposal and choose wisely, you only have 6 hours to spare before letting them all go.

Fortunately, you're not exactly... alone on your quest. But I can't spoil everything now can I.

Only one way to find out all there is to know. I hope you'll enjoy Crooked Knobs. In more than one way, goes without saying!

  • Unravel the mystery behind Viktor Von Schlonger's attempted murder and his eccentric mansion in Five distinct murder cases.

  • Meet 12 different guests, and press them to tell you the truth. Where you press them and how deeply you'll do it, is up to you.

  • Discover an interconnected story full of twists and turns.

  • Use your observation skills to find evidence and put 6 and 9 together! Nothing during a case is signposted or covered in yellow paint, look around carefully, and don't leave any stone unturned!

  • Study your opponents through your Detective tools: have a chat, gather them all for a mass interrogation, spy on them when they disappear, or challenge them to a Tongue Wrestling Match.

  • You're not alone in this quest, your "Partner" will give you a hand~ with some of the most valuable tools in your arsenal.

  • See and unlock many, many, MANY spicy scenes.

ABOUT THESE "AI CONTENT DISCLOSURE" THAT ARE ALL THE RAGE NOWADAYS....

None of that here. Absolutely NO ASSET in this game is, or will EVER be created, through the use of generative AI. That's why I ask you guys to be patient and bear with me, it is going to take a minute to get this done.

In the meantime though, I've prepared a demo prologue to hold you over (releasing December 15, 2025), containing all original content not present in the main game. Please enjoy!

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: 2.8 GHz Intel Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 12 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Any GPU with at least 4GB of VRAM
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: 2.8 GHz Intel Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Any GPU with at least 8GB of VRAM
  • Storage: 2 GB available space

  • Processor: 2.8 GHz Intel Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 12 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Any GPU with at least 4GB of VRAM
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
